content.hint: 表示‘送到某处’的常用短语，常用于职场请求帮助
content.situation: 员工在前台拿了一个快递，想请前台帮忙送到自己的办公室
content.speakerText: Could you ______ this to my office? I'm in a meeting right now.
content.speakerTextCn: 你能把这送到我办公室吗？我现在在开会。
content.knowledgePoint: 高频请求表达：drop off + 物品 + to 地点
content.responseTemplate: Could you ______ this to my office? I'm in a meeting right now.
